name: Scallop Broil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler for 10 minutes.
2. Rinse the scallops and pat them dry with paper towels.
3. Melt butter with garlic in a small saucepan.
4. Swirl half of the garlic butter around the sides and bottom of a shallow baking dish.
5. Arrange the scallops in a single layer in the dish.
6. Season the scallops with salt, pepper, and cayenne.
7. Thoroughly mix paprika and flour; dust the scallops with this mixture.
8. Pour the remaining garlic butter over all the scallops.
9. Broil for 6-8 minutes until golden brown.
10. Garnish with parsley sprigs and lemon wedges.
